title: ETT First Bounded Knowledge Import Plan
objective: Define the first bounded active import tranche from NETA ETT Study Material into the unified platform root using the approved knowledge classification and retention rules without performing a physical repo import.
constrained_outputs: A first-tranche import manifest for active knowledge governance, manifests, extractions, templates, and related low-weight assets
Explicit exclusions for heavy source-library and archive material
Target homes under docs/knowledge, knowledge, and ops/knowledge-*
Smallest follow-on execution packet recommendation for the first physical knowledge import
validation_steps: Confirm the first tranche stays bounded to active low-weight knowledge assets and excludes wholesale repo import
Confirm heavy source-library and archive material are handled through the retention policy rather than silent carryforward
Confirm target homes under docs/knowledge, knowledge, and ops/knowledge-* are explicit by slice
Confirm no physical movement of the full source-PDF library or Development tree occurs in this packet
sql_permission_note: This packet is knowledge-import planning only. It does not authorize wholesale repo import, archive migration, or storage-heavy payload movement.
